abilities.name: Catalyst
abilities.text: When an enemy model with a friendly Poison token activates within 3", deal 1 damage to it.

abilities.name: "Not Leavin', Are Ya?"
abilities.text: After an enemy model resolves an action that caused it to leave engagement with this model, it gains a Poison token. If that enemy has a friendly Poison token, it is dealt 1 damage instead.

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

triggers.name: Got Your Nose
triggers.text: After killing, this model or a friendly master may place into base contact with an enemy model within 6" of its current location.

triggers.name: Biofuel
triggers.text: Remove a friendly Poison token from the target. Declare this action again.

triggers.name: "Found the Tumor"
triggers.text: Summon a Little Gasser in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Vial of Goo
actions.effects: The target gains a Poison token.

triggers.name: That Smells Foul
triggers.text: Enemy models within (aura)2" of the target must pass a TN 11 Wp duel or gain a Poison token. This model may move models that gain a token this way up to 3".

actions.name: Gather Parts
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target an ally or a Remains marker. Place this model in base contact with the target. Then, if this action targeted a marker, remove the target and gain a Focused token.
